revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 1024x512 pixel-art animated sprite sheet on a solid #FF00FF chroma-key background. No gradients. No transparency. No extra files. Layout is exactly 4 columns x 2 rows, 8 equal cells, each cell 256x256 px. Do not draw grid lines, cell borders, separators, frame numbers, labels, text, watermarks, UI, or any marks other than the character.

Asset profile: snes16_platformer_v1. Preset: hd_walk8_256. Animated sprite, 8-frame walk cycle for ONE direction only. TOP row = frames 1-4 left to right. BOTTOM row = frames 5-8 left to right. Every frame stays fully inside its own 256x256 cell with clear solid #FF00FF margin on all four sides. Exactly one character per cell. Same character identity, same scale, same head size, same total upright height, same sturdy body volume, same outline thickness, same palette, same pixel density. Feet share the same ground line in all frames and head height stays consistent in upright frames.

Use the attached reference image as the exact character reference. Treat this as re-posing the referenced character, not redesigning him. Match the reference proportions exactly: about 2.4 heads tall, sturdy grounded build, solid chest, thick limbs, broad stable stance, not slim, not lanky, not taller. Maintain the same head-to-body ratio and same side-view body volume as the front/reference frames.

Character: original bright mythical-Japan action RPG hero named Mito, androgynous 15-year-old wanderer. Top-down 3/4 view but facing LEFT in a clean side profile, walking toward the left. Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, calm amber eyes. Outfit: white tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided cord belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. At the visible left hip is a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard wrapped with a thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers, reading as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana. Sword stays sheathed in every frame and is never held.

Walk cycle realism, left-facing: frame 1 CONTACT A with one leading foot planted forward and the other trailing; frame 2 weight drop; frame 3 PASSING with feet together under body and body 1-2 pixels higher; frame 4 push-off; frame 5 CONTACT B with the OTHER foot planted forward, mirror step of frame 1; frame 6 weight drop; frame 7 PASSING; frame 8 push-off. Legs alternate between stride frames. Do not repeat the same leading leg twice. Arms swing opposite to the legs and change pose together with legs. Show believable flat-foot ground contact under body weight. No floating, tiptoeing, or sliding. Consecutive frames must have visibly different leg silhouettes; front and back legs visibly scissor past each other between frame 1 and frame 5. Stride length is consistent. Haori hem, cords, tassels, ponytail ornament, and paper streamers sway subtly with motion but remain attached.

Pixel-art rendering: crisp high-resolution 16-bit-plus pixel art, fine readable pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur, consistent cheerful palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source. Character drawn large, filling most of each cell height with a small margin, centered in every cell. All empty space is clean solid #FF00FF. No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, dust specks, seam slivers, leftover effect residue, or floating accessories.

Avoid any copyrighted character/logo/likeness, samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, companion creature, birds, letter emblems, text, watermark, or UI.
